description: The minimum host requirements for *anything* in Kyberion to run: Node, pnpm, git, and a built workspace. Every other manifest implicitly depends on this one being satisfied first.

capabilities.description: Node.js v22+ on PATH (the only runtime Kyberion targets). Older versions miss native fetch+stream APIs the reasoning backends rely on.

install.instruction: Install Node.js 22+ via your version manager: `nvm install 22 && nvm use 22` or `mise install node@22`. Operator-confirmed because the version manager change can affect other projects.

capabilities.description: pnpm package manager on PATH; `npm` and `yarn` are not supported.

install.instruction: Use Corepack (`corepack enable pnpm`) or `npm i -g pnpm`. Pinned major: `pnpm@10`.

capabilities.description: git on PATH; KSMC creates a per-mission repository, so without git missions cannot start.

install.instruction: macOS: `brew install git`. Debian/Ubuntu: `apt-get install -y git`. Other platforms: see the docs link.

capabilities.description: The TypeScript build under `libs/core/dist/` is fresh enough that imports of @agent/core resolve at runtime. Missing dist means anything that requires `@agent/core/<sub>` will fail.

install.instruction: Runs the workspace build (`pnpm build`). Non-operator-confirmed because it is fully reversible and writes only to `dist/`.
